blocks.content: Savannah picked up on the second ring.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Kit. Why is your name showing up on my phone when you're supposed to be in California.
A pause. Then the sound of footsteps. Then:

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Kit McKinley you better not be doing what I think you're doing.
She came out in socks, one hand over her mouth, the other gripping her phone. He had the camera up. She looked at it and then at him and she was already crying before he said a word.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I just need you to talk to her. Whatever you want her to know.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I hate you for not warning me.
She looked into the camera. Took a breath.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Daisy. I have been your best friend since we were nine years old and I have watched you love this person — quietly, carefully, the way you do everything — for as long as I can remember. And I just need you to know that you deserve every single thing he's about to give you. You have always deserved it. Say yes. Say it as many times as it takes.
She wiped her face with the back of her hand.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Are you going to cry when she watches this.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I'm not going to answer that.
